hypothesis: Pretraining EfficientNet-B0 on additive-free SEM images and fine-tuning it on the small additive-induced SEM target dataset with targeted oversampling will produce higher class-wise accuracy and F1 scores for simultaneous classification of NCM composition and aging state than models fine-tuned without source pretraining, fine-tuned using weighted loss, or trained from scratch because the transferred morphological features generalize across the two domains.
